title: Visualizing Cartesian Products and Resulting Relations
description: A diagram showing how Cartesian products form ordered pairs from sets, and how subsets of these products define relations between elements.
elements: Relation R: A subset of A×B (e.g., {(1,x), (2,y)})
relationships: Set A and Set B are inputs
A×B is the set of all possible ordered pairs from A and B
A Relation R is any subset chosen from the Cartesian Product A×B
